allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys; lines=[\(int\(l.split\(':'\)[0]\),l.strip\(\)\) for l in sys.stdin]; prev=[\(n,l\) for n,l in lines if n<915]; print\(prev[-1]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; lines=sys.stdin.readlines\(\); [print\(i+1, l, end=''\) for i,l in enumerate\(lines\) if 'UNITS' in l]")
Bash(python -c "import calc as _calc; print\(_calc.CalcEngine.UNITS\); print\(_calc.CalcEngine.bytes_to_units.__doc__ if hasattr\(_calc.CalcEngine.bytes_to_units, '__doc__'\) else 'no doc'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'lib'\); from _calc import CalcEngine; e=CalcEngine\(\); print\(CalcEngine.UNITS\); print\(e.bytes_to_units\(1024\)\); print\(e.unit_to_bytes\('1','KB'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'lib'\); from _calc import CalcEngine; e=CalcEngine\(\); print\(e.bytes_to_units\(0\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from lib._calc import CalcEngine; c = CalcEngine\(\); print\(c.safe_eval\('7/2'\)\); print\(c.unit_to_bytes\(1.5, 'KB'\)\); print\(c.bytes_to_units\(0\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; im=Image.open\('assets/chip.ico'\); print\('format:', im.format\); print\('sizes:', sorted\(im.ico.sizes\(\)\) if hasattr\(im,'ico'\) else im.size\)")
